episodes.name: My Bad
episodes.overview: Jimmy grapples with being an empty nester and feeling torn about Alice's major life choice. Paul faces fresh challenges with his Parkinson's.

episodes.name: Happiness Mission
episodes.overview: The gang unites to support Paul during a health setback. Jimmy and Alice help Louis take a big step. Liz and Derek make a tough choice.

episodes.name: D-Day
episodes.overview: Jimmy and Liz show up for Brian and Charlie when Ava goes into labor. Sean reconnects with his ex Marisol.

episodes.name: The Field
episodes.overview: Gaby invites Jimmy to speak to her class. When Derek ends up in the hospital, Liz has issues with their son. Paul has an important realization.

episodes.name: Hold Your Horsies
episodes.overview: Jimmy and Meg unite over their love for Paul. Gaby considers her future with Derrick #2. Marisol pushes Sean and Alice out of their comfort zones.

episodes.name: Dereks Don't Die
episodes.overview: When Derek's health takes a turn for the worse, Jimmy helps Liz cope. Meg comes clean with Paul. Gaby makes progress with Maya.

episodes.name: I Will Be Grape
episodes.overview: Alice and Jimmy celebrate Tia's birthday. Liz's mother-in-law visits. Paul ponders his legacy.

episodes.name: Depression Diet
episodes.overview: Jimmy finally goes on a first date with Sofi. Gaby has a crisis of confidence. Liz learns more about Brian's living situation.

episodes.name: Daddy Issues
episodes.overview: Jimmy is stressed out by his father's presence. Sean grapples with the fallout of his decision. Paul helps Gaby start something new.

episodes.name: The Bodyguard of Sadness
episodes.overview: The gang celebrates Alice's graduation, as Jimmy struggles with unresolved feelings. Liz and Derek differ on what their future should look like.

episodes.name: And That's Our Time
episodes.overview: As Alice heads to college, Jimmy tries to repair things before it's too late. Gaby makes a happy discovery.

name: Season 3
overview: Jimmy and his rag-tag crew pick up the pieces of last season, forcing them to reckon with grief, second chances, and the messy road toward healing. With old clients still reeling and a few new faces entering the fold
